umidi
  • API Reference
  • Template Class EventQueue
  • View page source

Template Class EventQueue

  • Defined in File event.hh

Class Documentation

template<size_t Capacity = 256>
class EventQueue

Public Functions

constexpr EventQueue() noexcept = default
inline bool push(const Event &e) noexcept

Push an event to the queue.

inline bool push_note_on(uint32_t pos, uint8_t ch, uint8_t note, uint8_t vel) noexcept

Push Note On event.

inline bool push_note_off(uint32_t pos, uint8_t ch, uint8_t note, uint8_t vel = 0) noexcept

Push Note Off event.

inline bool push_cc(uint32_t pos, uint8_t ch, uint8_t cc, uint8_t val) noexcept

Push CC event.

inline bool pop(Event &out) noexcept

Pop next event.

inline bool pop_until(uint32_t sample_pos, Event &out) noexcept

Pop events up to and including sample_pos.

inline bool peek(Event &out) const noexcept

Peek at next event without removing.

inline bool peek_sample_pos(uint32_t &pos) const noexcept

Peek at next event’s sample position.

inline bool empty() const noexcept

Check if queue is empty.

inline size_t size() const noexcept

Get number of events in queue.

inline size_t available() const noexcept

Get available space.

inline void clear() noexcept

Clear all events.

Public Static Functions

static inline size_t capacity() noexcept

Capacity of the queue.
